definitions.text: Similar or identical in value, meaning or effect; virtually equal.
examples: To burn calories, a thirty-minute jog is equivalent to a couple of hamburgers.

definitions.text: Of two sets, having a one-to-one correspondence.
Relating to the corresponding elements of an equivalence relation.
Anything that is virtually equal to something else, or has the same value, force, etc.
To make equivalent to; to equal.
